sword.name: Sword Basics
sword.desc: Passive: +1 Accuracy while wielding a sword.

sword.name: Combat Stance
sword.desc: Passive: +1 Physical Defence while wielding a sword.

sword.name: Quick Strike
sword.desc: Action: Sword attack. Attack roll d20 + accuracy (+) vs Physical Defence; weapon damage on hit.

sword.name: Parry
sword.desc: Reaction: When hit by a melee attack, roll d20 + accuracy vs the attacker's accuracy; on success, block the hit (no damage).

sword.name: Lunge Attack
sword.desc: Action: Extended-reach sword attack (+5ft range). Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; weapon damage +1 on hit.

sword.name: Riposte
sword.desc: Reaction: After a successful Parry, counter with a Basic Attack (+2 damage on hit). Costs 1 stamina.

sword.name: Sweeping Slash
sword.desc: Action: Wide sword arc. Up to 3 adjacent enemies; separate attack roll (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence) vs each; weapon damage on each hit.

sword.name: Blade Dance
sword.desc: Action: Sword combo of 3 attacks. Each attack roll is d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence −1; weapon damage +1 on each hit.

sword.name: Defensive Stance
sword.desc: Toggle: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence, but −1 damage on your attacks. Costs 1 stamina per turn (max 10 turns).

sword.name: Master Parry
sword.desc: Reaction: On a successful Parry, reflect the melee attack back at the attacker for full damage.

sword.name: Whirlwind Strike
sword.desc: Action: Spinning sword attack. One attack roll per enemy within 10ft (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence −2); weapon damage on each hit. Friendly fire possible.

sword.name: Piercing Thrust
sword.desc: Action: Armour-piercing sword thrust. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, weapon damage. Critical hit on natural 18–20. Target's armour bonuses do not add to Physical Defence against this attack.

sword.name: Sword Mastery
sword.desc: Passive: +3 damage on sword hits; critical hits restore 1 stamina.

ranged.name: Ranged Basics
ranged.desc: Passive: +1 Accuracy while wielding a ranged weapon.

ranged.name: Steady Aim
ranged.desc: Passive: +2 accuracy when you didn't move this turn

ranged.name: Grappling Shot
ranged.desc: Action: Fire a grappling arrow at a surface or creature within 30ft. Pull yourself to it, or pull a target toward you (GM may call for a contest). No damage unless your table combines it with a separate attack.

ranged.name: Aimed Shot
ranged.desc: Action: Ranged weapon attack with extra aim time. Attack roll d20 + accuracy (+3) vs Physical Defence; on a hit, weapon damage +2.

ranged.name: Power Shot
ranged.desc: Action: Ranged weapon attack at full draw. Attack roll d20 + accuracy (−1) vs Physical Defence; on a hit, weapon damage +4.

ranged.name: Covering Fire
ranged.desc: Action: Ranged weapon attack (bow) to suppress a foe. d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; weapon damage on hit; 40% chance to apply Weakened. Until your next turn, one ally you choose gains +2 accuracy against that target.

ranged.name: Multi Shot
ranged.desc: Action: Make 2 ranged weapon attacks as one action. Each attack roll is d20 + accuracy vs that target's Physical Defence; weapon damage on each hit. Target one foe twice or two foes once each.

ranged.name: Piercing Shot
ranged.desc: Action: Fire one ranged weapon shot along a straight line. Separate attack roll (d20 + accuracy) vs each enemy in that line; weapon damage on each hit. Does not ignore Physical Defence.

ranged.name: Explosive Shot
ranged.desc: Action: Ranged weapon attack that detonates on impact. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs primary target's Physical Defence (−1 accuracy); weapon damage on hit. Each other creature in 10ft: separate attack roll (d20 + accuracy −1) vs each target's Physical Defence; weapon damage on each hit. Friendly fire possible.

ranged.name: Parting Shot
ranged.desc: Action: Ranged weapon attack (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; weapon damage on hit), then move up to 15ft without provoking opportunity attacks.

ranged.name: Quick Draw
ranged.desc: Passive: You may attack with ranged weapons the same turn you move (others cannot).

ranged.name: Projectile Barrage
ranged.desc: Action: Saturate a 20ft-radius area. One attack roll per enemy inside (d20 + accuracy −3) vs each target's Physical Defence; weapon damage on each hit. Friendly fire possible.

ranged.name: Homing Shot
ranged.desc: Action: Ranged weapon attack that automatically hits one chosen target (once per combat) — no attack roll. Weapon damage on hit.

ranged.name: Rapid Fire
ranged.desc: Action: Make 4 ranged weapon attacks. Each attack roll is d20 + accuracy −1 vs Physical Defence; weapon damage on each hit.

ranged.name: Siege Shot
ranged.desc: Action: One heavy ranged weapon shot along a 120ft line. Separate attack roll (d20 + accuracy) vs each enemy in the line; weapon damage on each hit.

ranged.name: Ranged Mastery
ranged.desc: Passive: +50% weapon range, +3 damage on ranged weapon hits, and critical hits do not consume ammunition.

axe.name: Axe Basics
axe.desc: Passive: +1 Accuracy while wielding an axe.

axe.name: Heavy Swing
axe.desc: Action: Overhead axe chop. Attack roll d20 + accuracy () vs Physical Defence; weapon damage +3 on hit.

axe.name: Cleave
axe.desc: Passive: When you kill an enemy, make a Basic Attack against an adjacent foe (costs 1 stamina).

axe.name: Armor Break
axe.desc: Action: Sunder armour. On a successful melee attack roll (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence), reduce the target's Physical Defence by 2 for 1 day (once per enemy).

axe.name: Throwing Axe
axe.desc: Action: Throw axe (30ft). Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; weapon damage on hit. Axe returns to your hand.

axe.name: Berserker Rage
axe.desc: Toggle: +2 Strength and +2 Physical Defence. Costs 2 stamina per turn (max 5 turns).

axe.name: Crushing Blow
axe.desc: Action: Axe smash. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; weapon damage on hit. 50% chance to apply Incapacitated (1 turn) and knock prone.

axe.name: Ricochet Axe
axe.desc: Enhancement: Thrown axe attacks may bounce to one additional target (separate attack roll per target; weapon damage on each hit).

axe.name: Wide Cleave
axe.desc: Action: Cleave arc (15ft). One attack roll (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence) per enemy in the arc; weapon damage on each hit.

axe.name: Earthquake Slam
axe.desc: Action: Ground slam (20ft radius). One attack roll per creature (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence −2); weapon damage on each hit; knockdown on hit. Friendly fire possible.

axe.name: Whirling Axes
axe.desc: Action: Spin with axes (10ft radius). One attack roll per enemy (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence −2); weapon damage on each hit. You may move while spinning. Friendly fire possible.

axe.name: Axe Storm
axe.desc: Action: Throw 6 axes (360°). Six attack rolls (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence); weapon damage on each hit.

axe.name: Axe Mastery
axe.desc: Passive: +3 damage on axe hits; axe attacks have a 25% chance to Cleave.

staff.name: Staff Basics
staff.desc: Passive: +1 Magic Power while wielding a staff.

staff.name: Mana Focus
staff.desc: Passive: Restore +1 stamina per turn while a staff is equipped.

staff.name: Spell Power
staff.desc: Passive: +2 Magic Power on magical attacks while using a staff.

staff.name: Arcane Shield
staff.desc: Action: Apply Spell Warded to yourself (magical immunity + magical damage halved, 8 turns).

staff.name: Staff Strike
staff.desc: Action: Melee staff strike. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, 1d6 + Magic Power damage.

staff.name: Spell Penetration
staff.desc: Passive: Your spell attack rolls treat the target's Magical Defence as 2 lower.

staff.name: Mana Burn
staff.desc: Action: Drain mana. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, apply Weakened (all stats −2) and drain 1d4+2 stamina from the target.

staff.name: Elemental Staff
staff.desc: Action: Imbue staff with Fire, Ice, or Lightning for 10 turns (GM: adds elemental flavour to staff strikes/spells).

staff.name: Dispel Ward
staff.desc: Action: Remove all magical effects from one target (ally or enemy).

staff.name: Staff of Power
staff.desc: Action: Release stored energy (60ft). Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 3d8 force damage + Magic Power.

staff.name: Reality Tear
staff.desc: Action: Open a dimensional rift — teleport anywhere within 100ft.

staff.name: Staff Mastery
staff.desc: Passive: +4 Magic Power; once per day, cast two spells in one turn.

dagger.name: Dagger Basics
dagger.desc: Passive: +1 Accuracy while wielding a dagger.

dagger.name: Light Step
dagger.desc: Passive: +1 Speed and silent movement while a dagger is equipped.

dagger.name: Dual Wield
dagger.desc: Passive: With a dagger in your main hand, unlock an off-hand dagger slot. Basic Attack rolls damage for both daggers.

dagger.name: Sneak Attack
dagger.desc: Action: Dagger attack from behind or while hidden. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; weapon damage +3 on hit.

dagger.name: Poison Blade
dagger.desc: Enhancement: Coat daggers with poison — escalating 1→2→3 damage over 3 turns on hit (GM).

dagger.name: Flurry
dagger.desc: Action: Make 4 dagger attacks. Each attack roll is d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence −1; weapon damage on each hit.

dagger.name: Shadowstep
dagger.desc: Action: Teleport behind a target within 30ft. Your next attack qualifies as Sneak Attack.

dagger.name: Vital Strike
dagger.desc: Action: Dagger vital strike. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; weapon damage on hit. Critical hit on natural 15–20.

dagger.name: Evasion
dagger.desc: Passive: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence; GM may allow a dodge roll to avoid area attacks.

dagger.name: Thousand Cuts
dagger.desc: Action: Eight dagger strikes — automatically hit (no attack roll). Weapon damage on each hit.

dagger.name: Shadow Clone
dagger.desc: Action: Create a mirror image that fights alongside you for 5 turns (50% your stats, GM).

dagger.name: Assassinate
dagger.desc: Action: Lethal strike. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a critical hit, instant kill on most enemies (GM discretion).

dagger.name: Dagger Mastery
dagger.desc: Passive: +2 Speed, +3 damage on dagger hits; attacks have 25% critical chance.

polearm.name: Polearm Basics
polearm.desc: Passive: +1 Accuracy while wielding a polearm.

polearm.name: Reach Advantage
polearm.desc: Passive: You may attack enemies 10ft away; they cannot reach you with melee unless they close distance.

polearm.name: Thrust Attack
polearm.desc: Action: Piercing polearm thrust. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence (treat target Physical Defence as 1 lower); weapon damage +2 on hit.

polearm.name: Defensive Stance
polearm.desc: Toggle: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence, but you cannot move. Costs 1 stamina per turn (max 10 turns).

polearm.name: Sweep Attack
polearm.desc: Action: Wide sweep. Up to 3 enemies in front; separate attack roll (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence) vs each; weapon damage on each hit.

polearm.name: Spear Wall
polearm.desc: Action: Set a 10ft-wide block. Enemies entering the zone are attacked (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence); weapon damage on hit.

polearm.name: Charge Attack
polearm.desc: Action: Charge then strike. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; weapon damage +1 per 5ft moved (max +6) on hit.

polearm.name: Trip Attack
polearm.desc: Action: Trip with polearm. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, knock target prone (they lose next turn, GM).

polearm.name: Phalanx Formation
polearm.desc: Passive: +1 Physical Defence and +1 Magical Defence per polearm ally within 10ft. + Harmony: No Reaction — when polearm allies within 10ft all attack the same target that round, +1 accuracy per polearm in that volley on that attack.

polearm.name: Impale
polearm.desc: Action: Impaling thrust. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, 3d6 damage and target cannot move for 3 turns.

polearm.name: Whirlwind Sweep
polearm.desc: Action: 360° sweep (15ft). One attack roll per enemy (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence −2); weapon damage on each hit. Friendly fire possible.

polearm.name: Fortress Stance
polearm.desc: Toggle: +4 Physical Defence and +4 Magical Defence; reflect 50% damage to attackers. Costs 3 stamina per turn (max 5 turns).

polearm.name: Polearm Mastery
polearm.desc: Passive: +20ft reach, +3 damage on polearm hits; opportunity attacks when enemies move (GM).

hammer.name: Hammer Basics
hammer.desc: Passive: +1 Accuracy while wielding a hammer.

hammer.name: Heavy Impact
hammer.desc: Action: Hammer blow. Attack roll d20 + accuracy () vs Physical Defence; weapon damage +4 on hit.

hammer.name: Armor Crusher
hammer.desc: Passive: Hammer attack rolls treat the target's Physical Defence as 2 lower.

hammer.name: Stunning Blow
hammer.desc: Action: Stunning hammer blow. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; weapon damage on hit. 50% chance to apply Incapacitated (1 turn).

hammer.name: Ground Slam
hammer.desc: Action: Ground slam (10ft). One attack roll per enemy (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence −1); weapon damage on each hit; knockdown on hit. Friendly fire possible.

hammer.name: Thunderstrike
hammer.desc: Action: Lightning-infused hammer strike. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, weapon damage + 2d6 lightning damage.

hammer.name: Earth Shaker
hammer.desc: Action: Earthquake hammer slam (20ft). One attack roll per creature (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence −2); weapon damage on each hit; difficult terrain. Friendly fire possible.

hammer.name: Berserker Swing
hammer.desc: Action: Wild hammer swing. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; weapon damage +6 on hit. Until your next turn, −3 Physical Defence and −3 Magical Defence.

hammer.name: Shield Breaker
hammer.desc: Action: Destroy a target's shield and remove Protected status (attack roll vs shield/holder, GM).

hammer.name: Mjolnir Strike
hammer.desc: Action: Throw hammer (60ft line). Attack roll (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence) per enemy in the line; weapon damage on each hit. Hammer returns.

hammer.name: Apocalypse Slam
hammer.desc: Action: Devastating slam (40ft radius). One attack roll per creature (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence −4); on each hit, 4d6 damage. Friendly fire possible.

hammer.name: Fortress Buster
hammer.desc: Action: Destroy structures or barriers (walls, doors) — no attack roll vs creatures.

hammer.name: Hammer Mastery
hammer.desc: Passive: +4 damage on hammer hits; attacks cause knockdown; immune to Incapacitated.

striker.name: Striker Basics
striker.desc: Passive: +1 Accuracy while both hands are empty. Unarmed Basic Attack uses 1d4 + Strength instead of 1 + Strength.

striker.name: Open Stance
striker.desc: Passive: +1 Speed and +1 Magical Defence while both hands are empty.

striker.name: Stone Fists
striker.desc: Passive: Unarmed Basic Attack uses 1d6 + Strength while both hands are empty.

striker.name: Slip Parry
striker.desc: Reaction: When hit by a melee attack, roll d20 + accuracy vs the attacker's accuracy; on success, block the hit (no damage). Requires both hands empty.

striker.name: Feint Strike
striker.desc: Action: Make 1 Basic Attack with +2 accuracy on the attack roll. Requires both hands empty.

striker.name: Iron Palm
striker.desc: Passive: +1 Physical Defence while both hands are empty. Unarmed Basic Attack uses 1d10 + Strength.

striker.name: Flurry of Blows
striker.desc: Action: Make 2 Basic Attacks while both hands are empty (each uses your striker basic dice + Strength).

striker.name: Joint Lock
striker.desc: Action: One Basic Attack; on hit, target's next attack is at −2 accuracy (1 round, GM). Requires both hands empty.

striker.name: Iron Body
striker.desc: Toggle: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence while both hands empty. Costs 1 stamina per turn (max 10 turns).

striker.name: Crushing Fist
striker.desc: Passive: Unarmed Basic Attack uses 1d12 + Strength while both hands are empty.

striker.name: Striker Volley
striker.desc: Action: Make 3 Basic Attacks while both hands are empty (each uses your striker basic dice + Strength).

striker.name: Iron Reversal
striker.desc: Reaction: After a successful Slip Parry, counter with as many Basic Attacks as your striker combo allows — 1 by default, 2 if you know Flurry of Blows, or 3 if you know Striker Volley (each uses your striker dice + Strength). Costs 2 stamina. Requires both hands empty.

striker.name: Striker Mastery
striker.desc: Passive: +2 Accuracy and +1 Strength while both hands are empty. Unarmed Basic Attack uses 2d10 + Strength.

fire.name: Fire Spark
fire.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 1d4 fire damage + Magic Power. 30ft range.

fire.name: Warm Hands
fire.desc: Spell: Create light (30ft radius) and restore 1 HP

fire.name: Fireball
fire.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 2d6 Fire damage + Magic Power. 60ft range.

fire.name: Fire Shield
fire.desc: Spell: Apply Protected (absorb 3 attacks + attackers take 1d4 fire damage)

fire.name: Ignite
fire.desc: Spell: Apply Burn (1 fire damage/turn + Strength -2 for 4 turns)

fire.name: Fire Wall
fire.desc: Spell: Create 30ft wall of flames, blocks passage and damages (2d4/turn)

fire.name: Explosion
fire.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 3d6 fire damage + Magic Power. 15ft.

fire.name: Phoenix Form
fire.desc: Spell: Apply Enhanced Mobility (flight + immunity to immobilization). GRANTS: Fire resistance 50% (half fire damage); Ice weakness 200% (double ice damage)

fire.name: Fire Attunement
fire.desc: Passive: Become attuned to fire magic. GRANTS: Fire resistance 50% (half fire damage); Ice weakness 200% (double ice damage)

fire.name: Fire Whip
fire.desc: Spell: 15ft reach fire lash. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 2d4 fire damage + Magic Power. May grapple (GM).

fire.name: Meteor
fire.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 6d6 fire damage + Magic Power. 20ft radius, -2 accuracy, friendly fire possible.

fire.name: Inferno
fire.desc: Spell: Area effect. One attack roll per creature (d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence -4); on each hit, 2d6 damage + Magic Power. GRANTS: Fire resistance 50% (half fire damage); Ice weakness 200% (double ice damage)

fire.name: Fire Tornado
fire.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 4d6 fire damage + Magic Power. 30ft/turn.

fire.name: Fire Supremacy
fire.desc: Action (3 uses per day): Become one with fire for 3 rounds. Gain immunity to fire damage, +50% fire spell damage, all attacks apply Burn, and regenerate 3 HP/turn. Can ignite objects by touch.

ice.name: Ice Shard
ice.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 1d4 ice damage + Magic Power. 30ft range.

ice.name: Frost Touch
ice.desc: Spell: Touch attack. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, applies Weakened (all stats -2 for 4 turns)

ice.name: Ice Armor
ice.desc: Spell: Gain +3 Physical Defence and +3 Magical Defence (raises your AC), immunity to fire damage (10 rounds)

ice.name: Ice Spear
ice.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 2d4 ice damage + Magic Power. 60ft.

ice.name: Freeze
ice.desc: Spell: Apply Immobilized (cannot move but can attack for 3 turns)

ice.name: Ice Wall
ice.desc: Spell: Create 30ft wall of ice (blocks passage, 20 HP)

ice.name: Blizzard
ice.desc: Spell: 20ft radius cold storm. One attack roll per creature (d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence); on each hit, 2d4 damage + Magic Power. apply Weakened to all inside Friendly fire possible.

ice.name: Ice Attunement
ice.desc: Passive: Become attuned to ice magic. GRANTS: Ice resistance 50% (half ice damage); Fire weakness 200% (double fire damage)

ice.name: Ice Prison
ice.desc: Spell: Trap one target in ice. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, target is immobile in ice until the cage takes 15 damage.

ice.name: Frost Nova
ice.desc: Spell: Freeze all enemies within 15ft (1 turn + slow)

ice.name: Absolute Zero
ice.desc: Spell: Instantly freeze any target (no save, 3 turns). GRANTS: Ice resistance 50% (half ice damage); Water resistance 25% (quarter water damage); Fire weakness 200% (double fire damage); Lightning weakness 400% (quadruple lightning damage)

ice.name: Ice Age
ice.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 1d6 cold damage + Magic Power. 200ft.

ice.name: Glacier
ice.desc: Spell: Massive 50ft ice wall that moves 20ft/turn. GRANTS: Ice resistance 50% (half ice damage); Water resistance 25% (quarter water damage); Fire weakness 200% (double fire damage); Lightning weakness 400% (quadruple lightning damage)

ice.name: Ice Dominion
ice.desc: Passive: Master ice magic, enhanced ice spell effects. GRANTS: Ice resistance 50% (half ice damage); Fire weakness 200% (double fire damage)

ice.name: Ice Supremacy
ice.desc: Action (3 uses per day): Become one with ice for 3 rounds. Gain immunity to ice/cold damage, +50% ice spell damage, all attacks apply Weakened, and create frozen terrain (difficult terrain) in 10ft radius. Temperature drops 50°F around you.

lightning.name: Spark
lightning.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 1d4 lightning damage + Magic Power. 20ft.

lightning.name: Static Charge
lightning.desc: Spell: Build electrical energy (+1 damage to next lightning spell)

lightning.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 2d6 Lightning damage + Magic Power. 100ft range.

lightning.name: Shock
lightning.desc: Spell: Stun target for 1 turn (save negates)

lightning.name: Chain Lightning
lightning.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence per target; on each hit, 2d6 damage + Magic Power.

lightning.name: Thunder Clap
lightning.desc: Spell: 20ft radius sound blast. One attack roll per creature (d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence); on each hit, 2d4 damage + Magic Power. Friendly fire possible.

lightning.name: Electric Field
lightning.desc: Spell: 30ft zone deals 1d6 lightning to anyone entering (1 min)

lightning.name: Lightning Attunement
lightning.desc: Passive: Become attuned to lightning magic. GRANTS: Lightning resistance 50% (half lightning damage); Water weakness 200% (double water damage)

lightning.name: Lightning Speed
lightning.desc: Spell: +3 Speed, extra move action (3 turns)

lightning.name: Overcharge
lightning.desc: Spell: Next spell deals maximum damage (no rolling)

lightning.name: Lightning Storm
lightning.desc: Fire an arrow that chains lightning between targets, dealing 3d6 lightning damage. Has a 75% chance to apply Incapacitated

lightning.name: Ball Lightning
lightning.desc: Spell: Slow orb (20ft/turn) explodes for 4d6 in 15ft radius

lightning.name: EMP
lightning.desc: Spell: 40ft radius disables all magic for 1 round

lightning.name: Storm Mastery
lightning.desc: Passive: Master lightning magic, enhanced electrical control. GRANTS: Lightning resistance 50% (half lightning damage); Water weakness 200% (double water damage)

lightning.name: Lightning Supremacy
lightning.desc: Action (3 uses per day): Become one with lightning for 3 rounds. Gain immunity to lightning damage, +50% movement speed, +50% lightning spell damage, all attacks apply Incapacitated, and can teleport 30ft as bonus action each turn.

earth.name: Stone Throw
earth.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 1d6 damage + Magic Power. 40ft range.

earth.name: Earth Sense
earth.desc: Spell: Detect movement through ground (100ft radius)

earth.name: Stone Armor
earth.desc: Spell: Rock shell (+3 Physical Defence and +3 Magical Defence (AC bonus), -1 Speed for 10 rounds)

earth.name: Earth Spike
earth.desc: Spell: Ground spike under one target. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 2d4 earth damage + Magic Power and knockdown.

earth.name: Mud Trap
earth.desc: Spell: Create 15ft difficult terrain, slows enemies 50%

earth.name: Stone Wall
earth.desc: Spell: Create 40ft stone barrier (blocks movement, provides cover)

earth.name: Earthquake
earth.desc: Spell: 25ft tremor. One attack roll per creature (d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence); on each hit, 2d6 earth damage + Magic Power and knockdown.

earth.name: Earth Attunement
earth.desc: Passive: Become attuned to earth magic. GRANTS: Earth resistance 50% (half earth damage); Wind weakness 200% (double wind damage)

earth.name: Stone Spear
earth.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 3d4 damage + Magic Power. 60ft range.

earth.name: Earth Shield
earth.desc: Spell: Apply Protected (floating stones absorb next 3 attacks completely)

earth.name: Mountain Crush
earth.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 5d6 damage + Magic Power. 20ft radius.

earth.name: Petrify
earth.desc: Spell: Apply Immobilized (cannot move but can attack + +5 Physical Defence and +5 Magical Defence for 3 turns)

earth.name: Tectonic Shift
earth.desc: Spell: Reshape 100ft area terrain for 1 day

earth.name: Stone Mastery
earth.desc: Passive: Master earth magic, enhanced stone manipulation. GRANTS: Earth resistance 50% (half earth damage); Wind weakness 200% (double wind damage)

earth.name: Earth Supremacy
earth.desc: Action (3 uses per day): Become one with earth for 3 rounds. Gain immunity to earth damage, +5 Physical Defence and +5 Magical Defence from stone skin, +50% earth spell damage, all attacks apply Immobilized, and can burrow through ground at half speed.

wind.name: Feather Fall
wind.desc: Spell: Slow falling (no fall damage for 1 round)

wind.name: Wind Blade
wind.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 2d4 damage + Magic Power. 50ft range.

wind.name: Levitate
wind.desc: Spell: Float in air (20ft height, 5 rounds)

wind.name: Wind Barrier
wind.desc: Spell: Deflect projectiles (+4 Physical Defence and +4 Magical Defence (AC bonus) vs ranged for 5 turns)

wind.name: Tornado
wind.desc: Spell: 15ft radius whirlwind. One attack roll per creature (d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence); on each hit, 3d4 damage + Magic Power. Friendly fire possible.

wind.name: Wind Attunement
wind.desc: Passive: Become attuned to wind magic. GRANTS: Wind resistance 50% (half wind damage); Lightning weakness 200% (double lightning damage)

wind.name: Suffocate
wind.desc: Spell: Remove air around target (2d4/turn for 3 turns)

wind.name: Wind Walk
wind.desc: Spell: Become incorporeal mist (immune to physical damage)

wind.name: Hurricane
wind.desc: Summon a devastating storm dealing 3d6 wind or water damage (whichever each target is weak to) to all enemies. Pushes enemies to storm's center

wind.name: Wind Prison
wind.desc: Spell: Trap target in air pocket (cannot move or act)

wind.name: Atmospheric Control
wind.desc: Spell: Control weather in 1 mile radius for 10 rounds

wind.name: Gale Mastery
wind.desc: Passive: Master wind magic, enhanced atmospheric control. GRANTS: Wind resistance 50% (half wind damage); Lightning weakness 200% (double lightning damage)

wind.name: Wind Mastery
wind.desc: Craft: Action (3 uses per day): Become one with the wind for 3 rounds. Gain flight, immunity to ground effects, +50% movement speed, and all attacks push enemies back 10ft. Can pass through enemy spaces without provoking attacks.

water.name: Water Splash
water.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 1d4 Water damage + Magic Power.

water.name: Purify Water
water.desc: Utility: Clean any liquid, remove poison from drinks

water.name: Water Whip
water.desc: Spell: Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence; on a hit, 2d4 water damage + Magic Power. 20ft reach.

water.name: Heal Wounds
water.desc: Spell: Restore 2d4+2 HP instantly OR apply Regeneration status

water.name: Create Water
water.desc: Utility: Summon fresh water (10 gallons), put out fires

water.name: Tidal Wave

career_fusion.name: Ember Hearth
career_fusion.desc: Craft: Cook meals without a campfire. Meals you cook gain +1 HP.

career_fusion.name: Glacier Pantry
career_fusion.desc: Craft: Preserve food twice as long; chilled rations grant +1 Stamina when eaten.

career_fusion.name: Field Spark
career_fusion.desc: Action: Stabilise downed ally — restore 1 HP and remove Stunned (once per target per day).

career_fusion.name: Shadow Snatch
career_fusion.desc: Action: Attempt to lift one small unequipped item from a target (GM contested roll). Once per long rest.

career_fusion.name: Mirage Patter
career_fusion.desc: Action: Create a brief believable illusion in conversation (+2 social bluff; no combat decoys).

career_fusion.name: Ward Meal
career_fusion.desc: Craft: Meal removes fear or charm on eat (once per creature per day).

career_fusion.name: Living Map
career_fusion.desc: Passive: Once per day, sense safest path through wilderness for 8 hours (GM navigation).

career_fusion.name: Trap Runes
career_fusion.desc: Craft: Snares that trigger a minor rune (alarm + 1d4 magic damage).

career_fusion.name: Alchemical Frost
career_fusion.desc: Craft: Flash-freeze vials — utility slow, no direct spell damage.

career_fusion.name: Beast Whisper
career_fusion.desc: Action: Calm one hostile beast for 1 minute (GM save).

unique.name: Familiar Summon
unique.desc: Action (once per day): Summon a loyal monster companion (build with 50 Lumens — GM). Lasts until dismissed or slain.

unique.name: Aetherial Shift
unique.desc: Reaction (once per combat): Ignore all damage from one attack. You cannot use Actions or Reactions until the end of your next turn.

unique.name: Ultimate Nova
unique.desc: Action: 30ft burst — hits every creature automatically (no attack roll). Each takes 3d20 physical damage (allies too). You are Incapacitated until your next turn.

unique.name: Mind Shield
unique.desc: Passive: Immune to mind control, illusions, and psychic damage. Cannot be charmed, frightened, or possessed.

unique.name: Cosmic Awareness
unique.desc: Passive: Sense all magical effects, hidden creatures, and dimensional rifts within 100ft. Can see through illusions and invisibility.

unique.name: Probability Shift
unique.desc: Reaction (once per combat): When you fail a roll, reroll and keep the better result. Once per combat you may also force one enemy to reroll a successful attack and keep the worse result.

unique.name: Instinctive Dodge
unique.desc: Reaction (once per round): When a single-target attack would hit you, roll d20 + Speed; if you beat the attacker's accuracy, negate the hit. Not vs area effects.

unique.name: Burst of Speed
unique.desc: Action: Move up to 2× your normal movement distance for 1 round. Cannot be used again on your next turn.

unique.name: Analyze
unique.desc: Action: Study one creature within 30ft — learn HP band, elemental resistances and weaknesses (25%/50%/200%/400% tiers), and one special trait (GM). Nearby traps/hazards revealed.

unique.name: Echo Location
unique.desc: Action: Emit a pulse revealing all creatures and objects within 50ft. Works through darkness; does not pass solid walls.

unique.name: Phase Step
unique.desc: Action: Instantly teleport up to 30ft in any direction, passing through solid objects. Cannot teleport into occupied spaces.

unique.name: Mind Read
unique.desc: Action: Read recent memories of a creature within 30ft. Understand desires and intentions; comprehend creatures without a shared language.

unique.name: Eternal Moment
unique.desc: Action (once per day): Stop time — take 3 extra turns in a row; enemies cannot react. Skip your next turn afterward.

unique.name: Soul Transference
unique.desc: Action (once per lifetime): Transfer your mind into another body — take their form and abilities. Your original body falls into a coma.

unique.name: Gravity Manipulation
unique.desc: Action: Alter gravity in a 10ft radius for 2 rounds. Enemies halve movement speed; allies double movement speed.

legendary.name: Monster Summoning
legendary.desc: Action (once per day): Summon a loyal monster companion (build with 50 Lumens — GM). Lasts until dismissed or slain.

legendary.name: Aetherial Shift
legendary.desc: Action (3 uses per day): Phase out for 1 round — immune to damage, pass through walls; you cannot attack or interact. Extra rounds cost 2 Stamina each.

legendary.name: Chronos Rewind
legendary.desc: Reaction (once per encounter): Undo the last action you or an ally took — reroll its dice or choose a different target (GM). Cannot undo death or major story beats.

legendary.name: Ultimate Nova
legendary.desc: Action (once per day): 100ft explosion — 8d6 damage to all creatures (each may save for half). You are Exhausted for 3 rounds and cannot cast spells for 1 round.

legendary.name: Soul Link
legendary.desc: Action (10 rounds): Link HP with one willing ally within 30ft — add both max HP into one pool; damage and healing split evenly. If the pool hits 0, both fall unconscious. Either may end early.

blacksmith.name: Weaponwright
blacksmith.desc: Craft: Martial weapons. Weapons you forge gain +1 damage.

blacksmith.name: Armourer
blacksmith.desc: Craft: Armour and shields. Armour you forge grants +1 Physical Defence and +1 Magical Defence.

blacksmith.name: Field Fit
blacksmith.desc: Pre-combat: Tune ally gear (10 min); +1 first attack roll or +1 Physical Defence first round (choose one). Once per ally per long rest. + Harmony Reaction: same ally (2 Smiths → both bonuses).

blacksmith.name: Tempered Steel
blacksmith.desc: Passive: Allies using your forged gear gain +1 to physical attack rolls (weapon damage unchanged).

blacksmith.name: Siege Breaker
blacksmith.desc: Action: Bypass mundane locks, hinges, or chains with tools (GM: one object per use).

chef.name: Camp Cook
chef.desc: Craft: Simple meals. Meal restores 1d4+1 HP when eaten.

chef.name: Hearty Rations
chef.desc: Craft: Travel food. After eating, +2 Stamina for 10 rounds.

chef.name: Spice Box
chef.desc: Passive: Meals you cook gain +1 HP restored or +1 round of meal buff duration.

chef.name: Second Serving
chef.desc: Action: Prepare one extra portion from the same ingredients (once per long rest).

chef.name: Banquet Planner
chef.desc: Craft: Feast for the party; shared +1 Accuracy for 20 rounds. + Harmony Reaction: same feast (each additional Chef adds +1 Accuracy and +5 feast duration; 9 Chefs → +9 Accuracy for 65 rounds).

chef.name: Battle Breakfast
chef.desc: Craft: Before first combat, one eater gains +2 initiative or +1 Physical Defence (first combat only). + Harmony Reaction: same meal (when 2+ Chefs, each served eater gets both bonuses; each Chef adds +2 initiative, +1 Physical Defence for one combat round, +1 Stamina round 1, and +1d4 temp HP at combat start; one eater per Chef).

chef.name: Chef's Instinct
chef.desc: Passive: Detect spoiled, drugged, or poisonous food by taste/smell (GM may require no roll).

farmer.name: Hands in the Soil
farmer.desc: Craft: Common herbs and rations from farm goods. Passive: +1 HP from natural food.

farmer.name: Crop Rotation
farmer.desc: Craft: Reliable herb yields when resting in wilderness or farmland (GM: extra herb loot).

farmer.name: Animal Sense
farmer.desc: Passive: Notice disturbed earth, tracks, and grazing signs within 30ft.

farmer.name: Preserve Harvest
farmer.desc: Craft: Salves and preserved goods that don't spoil for a week.

farmer.name: Green Thumb
farmer.desc: Craft: Magical or rare plants (ties to herbalism recipes).

farmer.name: Landmark Memory
farmer.desc: Action: Recall terrain — +2 on navigation checks in regions you've worked (GM).

farmer.name: Bountiful Plot
farmer.desc: Passive: Party gains +1 material find when looting plants/organics after a fight.

medic.name: Field Medic
medic.desc: Craft: Health potions. Potions you brew restore +2 HP.

medic.name: Triage
medic.desc: Action: Assess a creature — learn HP band, bleeding, poison, disease (not exact HP unless GM allows).

medic.name: Antidote Training
medic.desc: Passive: +2 effective Magical Defence vs poison/disease effects on yourself; identify poison on sight.

medic.name: Clean Bandage
medic.desc: Action: Stabilise a downed ally (0 HP) so they don't worsen; restore 1 HP.

medic.name: Surgical Touch
medic.desc: Craft: Advanced potions and antidotes. Healing items you use on others gain +1d4 HP.

medic.name: Plague Ward
medic.desc: Passive: Allies within 10ft +1 Magical Defence vs disease and poison saves. + Harmony: +1 Magical Defence vs disease and poison per Medic with this aura in range (no Reaction).

medic.name: Revival Draft
medic.desc: Craft: Rare stimulant — remove Incapacitated or one minor debuff (once per target per day).

alchemist.name: Acid Vials
alchemist.desc: Craft/throw: On hit 1d6 acid; 40% Weakened. + Harmony Reaction: same target, same round (+1 acid damage per Alchemist).

alchemist.name: Smoke & Flash
alchemist.desc: Craft: Distraction devices (smoke, blinding powder) — no damage, utility.

alchemist.name: Label Reader
alchemist.desc: Passive: Identify unknown liquids/powders safely (poison, potion, inert).

alchemist.name: Explosive Compounds
alchemist.desc: Craft: Bombs (3d6 in 15ft; separate attack roll per target vs Magical Defence).

alchemist.name: Transmute Salts
alchemist.desc: Craft: Convert common materials into alchemical bases (GM: daily quota).

alchemist.name: Volatile Expert
alchemist.desc: Passive: You and allies take −1 damage from your own alchemical friendly fire (min 0).

enchanter.name: Rune Apprentice
enchanter.desc: Craft: Apply one minor enchant (+1 stat or flavour effect).

enchanter.name: Elemental Ink
enchanter.desc: Craft: Fire/Ice/Lightning +1d6 on weapon (as fusion-lite, not a toggle).

enchanter.name: Ward Scribe
enchanter.desc: Craft: Protective charms (+1 Magical Defence permanent slot enchant on armour).

enchanter.name: Identify Magic
enchanter.desc: Action: Inspect a magic item — learn properties and curse risk.

enchanter.name: Soul Bind
enchanter.desc: Craft: Bind item to owner (others suffer −2 using it).

enchanter.name: Dispel Touch
enchanter.desc: Action: Suppress one magical effect on an object or creature for 1 hour.

detective.name: Keen Eye
detective.desc: Action: Examine scene; GM reveals one clue tier. + Harmony Reaction: same scene (+1 clue tier per Detective).

detective.name: Trace Evidence
detective.desc: Passive: Spot disturbed objects, footprints, blood, recent magic residue.

detective.name: Interview
detective.desc: Action: Conversation grants +2 to read lies or pressure answers (GM social roll).

detective.name: Case Notes
detective.desc: Passive: Once per scene, reroll a failed investigation check.

detective.name: Reconstruct
detective.desc: Action: Visualise past events in a location (last 24 hours, GM narrative).

detective.name: Follow the Trail
detective.desc: Action: Determine direction a specific person/creature went within last 8 hours.

detective.name: Deduction
detective.desc: Passive: Connect two prior clues — GM must give a useful inference if both are known.

archaeologist.name: Artifact Study
archaeologist.desc: Action: Identify relics — true properties, era, curse flags.

archaeologist.name: Ancient Tongues
archaeologist.desc: Passive: Read common dead languages; translate inscriptions slowly.

archaeologist.name: Trap Sense
archaeologist.desc: Passive: +2 to notice ancient traps and structural weak points.

archaeologist.name: Careful Extraction
archaeologist.desc: Action: Remove relic without triggering trap (GM check).

archaeologist.name: Lost Technique
archaeologist.desc: Passive: Once per adventure, recognise weakness vs undead/construct; party +2 damage for one fight. + Harmony: +1 party damage per additional Archaeologist on same enemy type same fight (no Reaction).

archaeologist.name: Divine Dig
archaeologist.desc: Action: Sense consecrated/desecrated ground and major burials within 60ft.

archaeologist.name: Replicate Relic
archaeologist.desc: Craft: Reproduce a studied artifact's mundane copy (not full magic without Enchanter).

ranger.name: Trail Warden
ranger.desc: Passive: Follow tracks in wilderness; know number and rough size of a group. Passive: Party ignores difficult terrain from undergrowth on overland travel (GM).

ranger.name: Ambush Spotter
ranger.desc: Passive: Party gains +1 initiative when you have 1 minute to scout ahead.

ranger.name: Snare Craft
ranger.desc: Craft: Simple traps (snare, alarm) — GM sets DC/effect.

ranger.name: Keen Sight
ranger.desc: Passive: +1 to notice hidden creatures, ambushes, or traps at range (you or allies on overwatch benefit).

ranger.name: Long Watch
ranger.desc: Action: Track a quarry for a day — learn camp sites and direction.

ranger.name: Camouflage Net
ranger.desc: Craft: Hide camp from casual search (+2 Stealth for camp).

ranger.name: Volley Call
ranger.desc: Action: Call a target; one ally +1 on next attack vs it. Once per combat. + Harmony Reaction: same target (each Ranger adds +1 to marked allies' next attack and marks one more ally).

engineer.name: Tinker
engineer.desc: Craft: Basic tools, crossbow bolts, simple mechanisms.

engineer.name: Clockwork Repair
engineer.desc: Action: Fix a jammed lock or stuck mechanism (GM).

engineer.name: Reinforced Frame
engineer.desc: Craft: Portable cover; +3 Physical Defence while behind it. + Harmony Reaction: same lane (+1 Physical Defence per additional Engineer).

engineer.name: Schematic Mind
engineer.desc: Passive: Understand how unfamiliar machines work after 1 minute study.

engineer.name: Siege Kit
engineer.desc: Craft: Breaching tools, pulleys, collapsible bridge sections.

engineer.name: Overcharge
engineer.desc: Action: Boost ally's mechanical device — double effect once, then it is spent until rebuilt (GM).

engineer.name: Demolition Plan
engineer.desc: Craft: Shaped charges — target structure weak point (not creature HP).

scholar.name: Well Read
scholar.desc: Action: Recall lore on a topic — GM gives one true fact.

scholar.name: Polyglot
scholar.desc: Passive: Speak/read two extra common languages.

scholar.name: Bestiary Notes
scholar.desc: Action: Identify creature type — resistances, habits (not exact stat block unless GM).

scholar.name: Map Archive
scholar.desc: Passive: Copy or remember maps; never lost in mapped dungeons without magic.

scholar.name: Forbidden Index
scholar.desc: Action: Know danger level of magic/curse on touch (safe study).

scholar.name: Teach
scholar.desc: Action: Ally gains your tier-1 knowledge skill for one task this session. + Harmony Reaction: same ally, different topics (ally keeps each granted edge once; no cap on number of topics).

scholar.name: Sage's Conclusion
scholar.desc: Passive: Once per adventure, declare a lore-based solution — GM must make it viable if plausible.

beast_handler.name: Animal Kin
beast_handler.desc: Passive: Calm non-magical beasts; read mood/intent.

beast_handler.name: Train Mount
beast_handler.desc: Craft: Tack and training — mount obeys commands in combat (GM companion rules).

beast_handler.name: Scent Partner
beast_handler.desc: Action: Animal alerts to poison, disease, or hidden creature within 30ft.

beast_handler.name: Veterinary
beast_handler.desc: Action: Stabilise beast; heal 1d6 HP or remove minor condition.

beast_handler.name: Falcon's Eye
beast_handler.desc: Action: Send scout animal — report layout of area ahead (limited range).

beast_handler.name: Pack Tactics
beast_handler.desc: Passive: When you and a beast attack same target, +1 accuracy for both.

beast_handler.name: Call the Wild
beast_handler.desc: Action: Summon mundane animals for distraction or transport (once per day, GM).

cleric_lay.name: Lay Blessing
cleric_lay.desc: Action: Touch ally; +1 Magical Defence for 8 hours (once per ally per day). + Harmony Reaction: same ally, same day (+1 Magical Defence per Cleric blessing that ally).

cleric_lay.name: Last Rites
cleric_lay.desc: Passive: Prevent undead rise from bodies you sanctify.

cleric_lay.name: Comfort the Dying
cleric_lay.desc: Action: Ally at 0 HP hears you — roll death saves twice, keep the better result (GM).

cleric_lay.name: Holy Symbol Craft
cleric_lay.desc: Craft: Symbols that grant +1 vs fear/mind control while worn.

cleric_lay.name: Turn Unholy
cleric_lay.desc: Action: Warded area 10ft — undead/demons hesitate to enter (GM save).

cleric_lay.name: Sanctuary Camp
cleric_lay.desc: Action: Short rest in consecrated camp; each ally removes one fear or charm. + Harmony Reaction: same camp (each ally removes one additional fear or charm per Cleric at that rest).

cleric_lay.name: Faith's Reservoir
cleric_lay.desc: Passive: Once per day, double HP restored by a potion you administer.

soldier.name: Soldier Training
soldier.desc: Passive: +1 Strength while wearing medium or heavy armour.

soldier.name: Shield Wall
soldier.desc: Action: Adjacent ally gains +1 Physical Defence until your next turn. + Harmony Reaction: same ally (each Soldier in the huddle adds +1 Physical Defence per Soldier helping — count heads, add that many once per Soldier; 3 Soldiers → +9 Physical Defence; 5 Soldiers on one ally → +25 Physical Defence).

soldier.name: Rally Cry
soldier.desc: Action: One ally within 30ft may reroll a failed save (once per combat). + Harmony Reaction: that reroll (+2 for each participating Soldier; 5 Soldiers → +10 on the reroll).

soldier.name: Hold the Line
soldier.desc: Passive: +1 Physical Defence when an ally is within 10ft.

soldier.name: Phalanx
soldier.desc: Passive: When you and two or more allies attack the same target, all gain +1 accuracy. + Harmony: +1 accuracy on next hit vs that enemy per Phalanx Soldier in the volley; when 2+ Phalanx Soldiers attack, also +1d4 damage per Phalanx Soldier (all focus-fire attackers benefit; no Reaction).

soldier.name: Second Wind
soldier.desc: Action: Restore 1d6 HP (once per short rest).

soldier.name: Commander's Presence
soldier.desc: Passive: Allies within 10ft gain +1 to initiative.

mage.name: Arcane Study
mage.desc: Passive: Allies you target with magic gain +1 effective Magic Power for buffs and heals you apply.

mage.name: Empower Ally
mage.desc: Action: Ally's next spell or magical attack +1d4 damage or heal +2 HP (once per ally per combat). + Harmony Reaction: same ally (when 2+ Mages, +1d6 damage or +3 HP instead).

mage.name: Mana Font
mage.desc: Passive: Allies within 10ft regain +1 Stamina when they cast a tier-1 spell (once per round per ally).

mage.name: Dispel Assist
mage.desc: Action: Grant an ally +2 on their next dispel or cleanse check (GM).

mage.name: Amplified Healing
mage.desc: Passive: Healing spells you cast on others restore +2 HP.

mage.name: Ward Circle
mage.desc: Action: 10ft aura; allies +1 Magical Defence for 3 rounds (once per combat). + Harmony Reaction: overlapping circles (each Mage in the overlap adds +1 Magical Defence per Mage helping — count Mages, add that many once per Mage; 3 Mages → +9 Magical Defence; 5 Mages → +25 Magical Defence).

mage.name: Shared Focus
mage.desc: Passive: Once per combat, sustain one ally's concentration effect without using your action (GM).

musician.name: Work Song
musician.desc: Action: Sustain up to 3 turns (5 Stamina once); allies in hearing range +1 Strength per performing Musician. + Harmony Reaction: join the same song (+1 Physical Defence per Musician while sustained; e.g. 6 Musicians → +6 Strength and +6 Physical Defence). Musician baseline: sing without an instrument; off-hand instruments amplify (see glossary Instrument amplify).

musician.name: Long Set
musician.desc: Passive: Your sustained songs may last 1 extra turn (e.g. Work Song up to 4 turns).

musician.name: Marching Tune
musician.desc: Action: Sustain up to 2 turns (4 Stamina once); allies in hearing range +1 Speed per performing Musician. + Harmony Reaction: join the same song (+1 initiative for listeners while sustained).

musician.name: Soothing Hymn
musician.desc: Action: Sustain up to 2 turns (4 Stamina once); allies in hearing range +1 Magical Defence per performing Musician. + Harmony Reaction: join the same song (+1 Stamina at the start of each listener's turn while sustained).

musician.name: Battle Anthem
musician.desc: Action: Sustain up to 3 turns (6 Stamina once); allies in hearing range +1 accuracy per performing Musician. + Harmony Reaction: join the same song (+1 damage on next hit per Musician while sustained).

musician.name: Dissonant Note
musician.desc: Action: Sustain 1 turn (4 Stamina once); enemies in hearing range −1 accuracy per performing Musician. + Harmony Reaction: join the same song (−1 per Musician on enemy saves while sustained).

musician.name: Encore
musician.desc: Passive: Once per combat, play the same song again for free — but it only lasts its original length (no Long Set, instrument, or other bonus turns).

paladin.name: Oathbound
paladin.desc: Passive: +1 Magical Defence; +2 on saves vs fear (GM).

paladin.name: Lay on Hands
paladin.desc: Action: Touch ally — restore 1d6+1 HP (once per ally per day).

paladin.name: Rebuke
paladin.desc: Action: One enemy hesitates — save or cannot use reactions until your next turn (once per combat).

paladin.name: Bulwark
paladin.desc: Passive: +1 Physical Defence while below half HP.

paladin.name: Aura of Protection
paladin.desc: Passive: Allies within 10ft +1 Magical Defence vs fear and charm. + Harmony: +1 Magical Defence vs fear and charm per Paladin with this aura in range (no Reaction).

paladin.name: Turn Shadow
paladin.desc: Action: Warded 10ft — hostile undead or demons save to enter (weaker than full Turn; once per combat).

paladin.name: Sacred Stance
paladin.desc: Action: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence until end of your next turn; you cannot move.

thief.name: Light Fingers
thief.desc: Passive: +2 on pickpocket and sleight-of-hand checks (GM).

thief.name: Slip Away
thief.desc: Action: Disengage — leave melee without provoking opportunity attacks (once per combat).

thief.name: Shadow Blend
thief.desc: Passive: +1 to Stealth when wearing light armour or no armour.

thief.name: Dirty Trick
thief.desc: Action: Distract a foe; one ally +2 on next attack vs that target. + Harmony Reaction: same foe (each additional Thief adds +1 to that attack).

thief.name: Filch
thief.desc: Action: Attempt to steal one small unequipped item from a target (GM contested roll; once per encounter).

thief.name: Escape Artist
thief.desc: Passive: +2 vs grapples, restraints, and mundane traps.

thief.name: Hit and Run
thief.desc: Passive: After you deal damage, move 10ft without provoking opportunity attacks (once per turn).

berserker.name: Battle Fury
berserker.desc: Passive: +1 damage on melee attacks while below half HP.

berserker.name: Reckless Strike
berserker.desc: Action: Your next attack gains +2 damage; you suffer −2 Physical Defence until your next turn.

berserker.name: Intimidate
berserker.desc: Action: Foes within 10ft save or −1 accuracy for 1 round. + Harmony Reaction: same area (−1 accuracy per Berserker on failed save).

berserker.name: Bloodlust
berserker.desc: Passive: On a kill or critical hit, regain 1 Stamina.

berserker.name: Rage
berserker.desc: Action: +2 Strength, −1 Magical Defence for 3 rounds (once per combat).

berserker.name: Unstoppable
berserker.desc: Passive: Ignore difficult terrain while moving toward a hostile target.

berserker.name: Executioner
berserker.desc: Passive: +2 damage vs bloodied targets (GM: below half HP).

marksman.name: Steady Hand
marksman.desc: Passive: +1 accuracy with ranged weapon attacks.

marksman.name: Overwatch
marksman.desc: Action: Ready a shot — interrupt one enemy moving in your line of sight (GM).

marksman.name: Suppressing Fire
marksman.desc: Action: Suppress a zone; enemies −1 to attacks or movement for 1 round. + Harmony Reaction: same zone (−1 penalty per Marksman).

marksman.name: Quick Reload
marksman.desc: Passive: Ranged attacks cost 1 less Stamina (minimum 0).

marksman.name: Called Shot
marksman.desc: Action: −2 to hit; on hit, +1d6 damage (once per target per combat).

marksman.name: Volley Support
marksman.desc: Passive: Allies gain +1 accuracy vs a target you damaged this round.

marksman.name: Snap Shot
marksman.desc: Passive: Your first ranged attack each combat ignores half-cover penalties (GM).

duelist.name: Precise Footwork
duelist.desc: Passive: +1 Speed while wielding a one-handed weapon.

duelist.name: Parry & Riposte
duelist.desc: Action: When hit by a melee attack, contest to negate damage once per round (GM).

duelist.name: Feint
duelist.desc: Action: Your next attack vs one target — roll twice, keep the higher result (once per combat).

duelist.name: Disengage Master
duelist.desc: Passive: Leaving melee does not provoke from one chosen foe per turn.

duelist.name: Flourish
duelist.desc: Action: Attack and force a save — on fail, target loses reactions until your next turn.

duelist.name: Dueling Stance
duelist.desc: Passive: +1 Physical Defence vs one chosen opponent until you change target.

duelist.name: Finishing Thrust
duelist.desc: Passive: +2 damage vs targets who have not yet acted this round.

elf.name: Elven Accuracy
elf.desc: Passive: +1 accuracy with ranged weapons and spells

elf.name: Forest Step
elf.desc: Action: Move through natural terrain without movement penalty, +2 stealth in forests

elf.name: Moonbeam
elf.desc: Spell: Create beam of silver light (2d6 light damage + reveals invisible enemies)

elf.name: Elven High Magic
elf.desc: Passive: All spells cost -1 stamina (minimum 1), immune to magical charm effects

elf.name: Starlight Mastery
elf.desc: Ultimate (once per long rest): 30ft burst — each enemy takes 4d8 light damage; each ally in the burst heals 2d6.

dwarf.name: Dwarven Toughness
dwarf.desc: Passive: +5 max HP, resistance to knockdown effects

dwarf.name: Forge Blessing
dwarf.desc: Passive: Crafted weapons/armor gain +1 enchantment slot and +1 to all stat bonuses

dwarf.name: Mountain Charge
dwarf.desc: Action: Charge 20ft ignoring difficult terrain (+3 damage, knockdown on hit)

dwarf.name: Runic Weapon
dwarf.desc: Enhancement: Your weapon deals +2d6 on the next 10 hits; those hits ignore elemental resistances.

dwarf.name: Ancestral Might
dwarf.desc: Toggle: +4 Strength, +3 Physical Defence, +3 Magical Defence while active (5 Stamina per round). +1 on craft checks while active.

halfling.name: Lucky Dodge
halfling.desc: Reaction: Force an enemy's attack to reroll (once per attack)

halfling.name: Sneaky Strike
halfling.desc: Action: Attack from stealth gains +3 attack roll

halfling.name: Fortune's Favor
halfling.desc: Action: Grant luck to ally (next 3 rolls — roll twice, keep higher) or curse enemy (roll twice, keep lower)

halfling.name: Miraculous Escape
halfling.desc: Reaction: When reduced to 0 HP, teleport to safety with 1 HP (once per day)

halfling.name: Legendary Luck
halfling.desc: Passive: Once per short rest, reroll one failed save. Once per short rest, one ally within 10ft may reroll one failed save (you choose when).

orc.name: Orcish Fury
orc.desc: Action: Next attack deals +1d6 damage; roll the attack twice and keep the higher result

orc.name: Intimidating Roar
orc.desc: Action: 15ft cone, apply Mind Controlled (fear variant) for 2 turns

orc.name: Blood Frenzy
orc.desc: Passive: When an enemy dies within 30ft, gain +2 damage for the rest of combat (max +6 from this skill)

orc.name: Unstoppable Charge
orc.desc: Action: Move through up to 3 enemies in your path; each takes 2d6 damage.

orc.name: Warchief Presence
orc.desc: Aura: Allies within 20ft gain +2 damage and cannot be frightened.

human.name: Human Determination
human.desc: Passive: +1 to all saving throws, resistance to Incapacitated. Unlocks Cross-Cultural Learning and Tier 1 monster skills.

dragonborn.name: Draconic Breath
dragonborn.desc: Action: 15ft cone — 2d6 damage of your dragonborn element; 20% chance to apply that element's status.

dragonborn.name: Draconic Presence
dragonborn.desc: Action: Project intimidating aura (enemies within 10ft must save vs fear)

dragonborn.name: Elemental Mastery
dragonborn.desc: Passive: All attacks deal +1d4 elemental damage of chosen element, immunity to said element

dragonborn.name: Dragon Wings
dragonborn.desc: Toggle: Manifest wings for flight (60ft speed, lasts 10 rounds)

dragonborn.name: Ancient Fury
dragonborn.desc: Ultimate (once per long rest): 30ft breath — 4d8 damage of your element; 95% chance to apply that element's status.

tiefling.name: Hellish Rebuke
tiefling.desc: Reaction: When damaged, attacker takes 1d6 fire damage

tiefling.name: Infernal Constitution
tiefling.desc: Passive: Fire immunity; Darkness resistance 50% (half darkness damage); +2 max Stamina.

tiefling.name: Devil's Bargain
tiefling.desc: Action: One enemy within 30ft — -2 on their next attack and next save; you take +1 damage from that enemy until your next turn.

tiefling.name: Summon Imp
tiefling.desc: Action: Summon imp familiar (fights alongside you for 5 rounds)

tiefling.name: Infernal Dominion
tiefling.desc: Ultimate (once per long rest): 30ft hellfire for 5 rounds — each enemy inside takes 1d8 fire at the start of their turn; allies inside gain +1 damage on attacks.

drow.name: Shadow Affinity
drow.desc: Passive: +3 stealth in dim light or darkness, darkvision extends to 150ft

drow.name: Drow Poison
drow.desc: Enhancement (one combat): Weapon attacks deal +1d4 poison; 20% chance to apply Dazed on hit.

drow.name: Darkness
drow.desc: Spell: Create 20ft radius of magical darkness for 3 turns (only you can see inside)

drow.name: Spider Climb
drow.desc: Action: Walk on walls and ceilings for 10 rounds (normal movement speed)

drow.name: Drow Matron Magic
drow.desc: Ultimate (once per long rest): Three shadow allies fight with you until combat ends (GM — one simple attack each per round).

gnoll.name: Pack Coordination
gnoll.desc: Passive: When ally hits same target, your next attack gains +2 damage

gnoll.name: Savage Bite
gnoll.desc: Action: Bite attack (1d8 + Strength, applies Poison)

gnoll.name: Howl of the Pack
gnoll.desc: Action: Rally allies within 30ft (+2 damage for 5 turns, immune to Mind Control)

gnoll.name: Rampage
gnoll.desc: Trigger: When you kill an enemy, move up to your Speed and make one bonus attack.

gnoll.name: Alpha Dominance
gnoll.desc: Ultimate (once per long rest): All allies within 30ft for 10 rounds — when an ally hits a foe, their next attack vs that foe gains +2 damage; when an ally drops an enemy, they may move and make one bonus attack.

defense.name: Damage Reduction
defense.desc: Passive: Reduce all incoming damage by 2 (applied after a hit).

defense.name: Regeneration
defense.desc: Passive: Apply Regeneration status (2 HP/turn + poison resistance) - does not stack with other regeneration

defense.name: Rapid Healing
defense.desc: Passive: Enhanced Regeneration (3 HP/turn + strong DoT resistance) - replaces basic regeneration

defense.name: Armored Plates
defense.desc: Passive: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence; immune to critical hits.

defense.name: Spell Turning
defense.desc: 25% chance to reflect spells back at caster

defense.name: Poison Resistance
defense.desc: Passive: Strong resistance to all poisons and diseases (25% damage from poison effects)

combat.name: Natural Claws
combat.desc: Action: Claw attack. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, 1d6+2 slashing damage.

combat.name: Razor Claws
combat.desc: Action: Claw attack. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, 1d8+3 slashing damage; causes bleeding (GM).

combat.name: Venomous Claws
combat.desc: Action: Claw attack. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, weapon damage + poison 1d4/turn (GM).

combat.name: Powerful Bite
combat.desc: Action: Bite. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, 1d8+1 piercing damage.

combat.name: Crushing Bite
combat.desc: Action: Bite. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence (treat Physical Defence as 2 lower); on a hit, 2d6+2 damage.

combat.name: Tail Swipe
combat.desc: Action: Tail sweep — adjacent enemies. Separate attack roll (d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence) vs each; 1d6 damage on each hit.

combat.name: Spiked Tail
combat.desc: Action: Tail strike (10ft reach). Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, 1d10+3 piercing damage.

combat.name: Charge Attack
combat.desc: Action: Charge 20ft and attack. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; double weapon/natural damage on hit.

combat.name: Berserker Rage
combat.desc: Toggle: +4 damage, +2 attacks per turn, −2 Physical Defence and −2 Magical Defence for 3 turns.

combat.name: Multiattack
combat.desc: Passive: Each turn, make 2 different attacks (each pays its own stamina cost).

combat.name: Rend
combat.desc: Passive: If both claw attacks hit the same target in one turn, deal bonus 1d6 damage.

combat.name: Pounce
combat.desc: Action: Leap 15ft and attack. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, knock prone.

combat.name: Gore Attack
combat.desc: Action: Horn attack. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, 1d8+2 piercing and push 5ft.

combat.name: Trample
combat.desc: Action: Move through enemies; each takes 1d6 damage (GM: attack roll or save as appropriate).

combat.name: Blood Frenzy
combat.desc: Passive: When an enemy drops below 25% HP, gain +3 damage until end of combat.

magic.name: Fire Breath
magic.desc: Action: 30ft cone. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence vs each target; on a hit, 2d8 fire + apply Burn. Grants fire resistance; ice/water weakness.

magic.name: Ice Breath
magic.desc: Action: 30ft cone. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence vs each target; on a hit, 2d6 cold + apply Weakened. Grants ice/water resistance; fire/lightning weakness.

magic.name: Poison Breath
magic.desc: Action: 25ft cone. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence vs each target; on a hit, 1d8 poison + apply Poison. Grants poison resistance; light/fire weakness.

magic.name: Lightning Breath
magic.desc: Action: 60ft line. Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Magical Defence vs each target; on a hit, 2d10 lightning + apply Immobilized. Grants lightning resistance; earth/water weakness.

magic.name: Acid Spit
magic.desc: Action: Spit acid (ranged). Attack roll d20 + accuracy vs Physical Defence; on a hit, 1d8 acid + apply Acid Corrosion. Grants poison resistance; ice/water weakness.

magic.name: Fear Aura
magic.desc: Passive: Apply Intimidating Aura (enemies must save vs Mind Control)

magic.name: Paralyzing Gaze
magic.desc: Target within 60ft: Apply Immobilized (cannot move but can attack)

magic.name: Invisibility
magic.desc: Apply Stealth Mastery (invisible + strong mind control resistance)

magic.name: Teleport
magic.desc: Instantly move up to 60ft to visible location

magic.name: Web Shot
magic.desc: Action: Ranged: Apply Immobilized (cannot move for 3 turns)

magic.name: Earthquake
magic.desc: 30ft radius: 3d6 damage, knock prone, difficult terrain. Grants earth resistance, wind/lightning weakness

magic.name: Mind Control
magic.desc: Apply Mind Controlled (control enemy actions for 3 turns)

magic.name: Energy Drain
magic.desc: Action: Touch: Apply Weakened (all stats -2) and drain 1d4 stamina

magic.name: Shadow Step
magic.desc: Move from shadow to shadow within 40ft. Grants darkness resistance, light weakness

magic.name: Terrifying Roar
magic.desc: 20ft radius: Apply Mind Controlled (fear variant - enemies flee)

utility.name: Flight
utility.desc: Passive: Apply Enhanced Mobility (flight + strong immobilization resistance)

utility.name: Burrow
utility.desc: Dig through earth at half speed, surprise attacks

utility.name: Natural Climber
utility.desc: Climb speed equal to land speed, no checks needed

utility.name: Aquatic
utility.desc: Swim speed, hold breath for 30 rounds

utility.name: Camouflage
utility.desc: Blend with surroundings: +8 to stealth checks

utility.name: Pack Leader
utility.desc: Summon 1d4 lesser creatures to fight for 5 turns

utility.name: Size Change
utility.desc: Double size for 5 turns: +4 Str, +2 reach, -2 Physical Defence and -2 Magical Defence

utility.name: Phase Shift
utility.desc: Become incorporeal for 3 turns, strong resistance to physical damage (25%)

utility.name: Ancient Knowledge
utility.desc: Passive: Know weakness of any creature (+4 damage vs that type)
